basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has released the official Project Research Scientist-I Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a First Class Postgraduate Degree (including integrated PG degrees) or a Second Class Postgraduate Degree (including integrated PG degree) with a Ph.D. are eligible to apply through Email on or before 20-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: First class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degrees, Second class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with PhD
qualification.details: First class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degrees. Second class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with PhD. Desirable: prior experience in molecular and cellular biology techniques, including FACS, Western blotting, ELISA, and biochemical assays. Experience in mouse immune immune cell isolation, cell culture, IHC/IF, mouse handling, dosing, tissue dissection, and tissue/plasma/serum collection.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_kanpur_ii: First class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degrees, Second class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with PhD

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: First class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degrees. Second class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with PhD. Desirable: prior experience in molecular and cellular biology techniques, including FACS, Western blotting, ELISA, and biochemical assays. Experience in mouse immune immune cell isolation, cell culture, IHC/IF, mouse handling, dosing, tissue dissection, and tissue/plasma/serum collection.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Project Research Scientist-I post at IIT Kanpur is 20 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Research Scientist-I?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-I post in the IIT Kanpur recruitment drive. This is a great opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Project Research Scientist-I position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Research Scientist-I post is Rs. 56000/- pm + 20% HRA. This is a competitive remuneration package for the role.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for Project Research Scientist-I?
faq.answer: Candidates need a first-class postgraduate degree or a second-class postgraduate degree with a PhD. Desirable experience includes molecular and cellular biology techniques and mouse handling.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Kanpur Project Research Scientist-I recruitment. The application process is free.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Project Research Scientist-I?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Research Scientist-I position at IIT Kanpur involves an online interview. Shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for Project Research Scientist-I?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Research Scientist-I post is Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016. The position is based at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The official website for the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is https://www.iitk.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and updates.

faq.question: Q10. Is the Project Research Scientist-I position permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The Project Research Scientist-I position at IIT Kanpur is contractual. It offers a fixed-term engagement for the selected candidates.
